title: isodon inflexus var. microphyllus
intro: Isodon inflexus var. microphyllus, also known as a type of Isodon plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and protecting against bacterial and viral infections. In herbal preparations, Isodon inflexus var. microphyllus is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
